figures.title: Pi: thin loop, explicit state, external isolation
figures.description: The current Coding Agent path at v0.80.7, with migration and optional policy branches separated from the observed spine.
figures.footer: Solid green: observed | Dashed green: controlled experiment | Dashed gray: source-visible optional path

figures.title: One observed read turn: two model iterations
figures.description: R-SCENARIO-002 is the running example; recovery and persistence branches are shown separately from the observed read path.
figures.footer: Observed with SiFlow qwen3.6-35ba3b, JSON mode, read-only tool, isolated HOME/workspace

figures.title: Pi design space: stance, mechanism, consequence
figures.description: Documented product choices are separated from analyst-synthesized tradeoffs; dotted edges are interpretation, not author intent.
figures.footer: Left: documented stance | Center: recovered implementation | Right: observable tradeoff (analyst synthesis)

figures.title: Pi context: sources converge, then the loop transforms
figures.description: Startup, lazy, carry-forward, runtime, and compacted sources remain distinct until the provider boundary.
figures.footer: Solid: observed in named traces | Dashed: source-visible | Dashed green: controlled compaction tests

figures.title: Pi extension surface: three different control points
figures.description: Context injection, capability registration, and action control are separate mechanisms with different safety implications.
figures.footer: Context and registry paths are source-visible; direct read execution was observed; policy and sandbox remain optional
